entries.title: Sharplink CEO says ETH treasury firms are diverging from Strategy model as Ethereum's tokenization role expands
entries.snippet: Joseph Chalom said growing institutional adoption of tokenization could strengthen Ethereum's role as infrastructure for onchain assets.

entries.title: Digital Prime Technologies launches digital asset lending platform
entries.snippet: Digital Prime Technologies, a provider of digital asset technology solutions, today announced the launch of Tokenet, its institutional digital asset lending platform, with the first trades now successfully executed on the platform.

entries.title: CoinList expands into tokenized asset distribution with 'Passage' as token sales slow
entries.snippet: CoinList has launched Passage. The move marks its expansion beyond token sales, which have slowed across the crypto industry in recent years.

entries.title: CME sets June 8 for Nasdaq-backed crypto index futures covering seven assets in first weighted contract
entries.snippet: CME Group to launch Nasdaq CME Crypto Index futures June 8 — its first market-cap-weighted crypto contract covering BTC and six other assets.
entries.tweet_text: CME sets June 8 for Nasdaq-backed crypto index futures covering seven assets in first weighted contract

entries.title: BlackRock, Janus Henderson tokenized funds get instant redemptions with new $1 billion facility
entries.tweet_text: @BlackRock, Janus Henderson tokenized funds get instant redemptions with new $1 billion facility

entries.title: Upshift rolls out new vault platform providing bridging capital for instant RWA redemptions
entries.snippet: Dedicated USDC vaults will provide instant liquidity to RWA holders when they want to redeem, with LPs earning redemption fees.

entries.title: Tether's T3 Crime Unit says it has frozen $450M in suspected illicit crypto
entries.snippet: T3 Financial Crime Unit says it has frozen over $450 million tied to suspected illicit activity as stablecoin compliance pressures intensify.

entries.title: Coinbase becomes Hyperliquid's official USDC treasury deployer as USDH sunsets
entries.snippet: Native Markets, the operator of Hyperliquid's USDH stablecoin, agreed to grant Coinbase the right to purchase USDH brand assets.

entries.title: Jewel Bank revives launch plans with stablecoin push
entries.snippet: Jewel Bank revives launch plans with stablecoin push Royal Gazette | Bermuda

entries.title: Traders say Ethereum ready for a 'strong move' after ETH price taps $2.3K
entries.snippet: Market analysts eye fresh Ethereum upside, fueled by JPMorgan and BlackRock tokenized fund moves plus looming CLARITY Act catalyst.

entries.title: Myriad Adopts Chainlink as Official Oracle Platform to Power New Crypto Prediction Markets
entries.snippet: Chainlink Runtime Environment enables Myriad to deploy a new range of prediction markets with immediate settlement.

entries.title: Societe Generale deploys stablecoins on Canton for tokenized finance
entries.snippet: France's SocGen plans to use its EURCV and USDCV stablecoins for tokenized collateral, repo financing and institutional settlement activity on the Canton blockchain network.
entries.tweet_text: @SocieteGenerale deploys stablecoins on Canton for tokenized finance

entries.title: Fidelity International launches Moody's-rated tokenized fund on Chainlink
entries.snippet: The Bermuda-based asset manager launched a tokenized liquidity fund using Chainlink and Sygnum infrastructure, with JPMorgan providing daily NAV data for pricing.
entries.tweet_text: @Fidelity International launches Moody's-rated tokenized fund on Chainlink

entries.title: Paybis secures MiCA and payment licenses in Latvia for EU crypto expansion
entries.snippet: Paybis has secured both a MiCA crypto licence and a PSD2 payment institution licence from Latvia’s central bank, becoming the first company in the country to hold both simultaneously.

entries.title: Bitwise CIO says GENIUS Act helped unlock crypto fundraising as tokenization now eyes Clarity Act boost
entries.snippet: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan drew three lessons from Arc, Canton, and Tempo's billion-dollar blockchain raises.

entries.title: Tokenized Treasuries hit $15 billion as bitcoin stalls, Fed rate-rise concerns build
Vietnam eyes Q3 launch for regulated crypto asset market: Report
entries.snippet: Vietnam’s deputy minister of finance reportedly said the country is planning to launch its regulated cryptocurrency market in the third quarter of 2026 to answer the growing demand for digital assets.

entries.title: JPMorgan Wants to Be the Reserve Bank for Stablecoin Issuers With New Ethereum Fund

entries.title: Korean won stablecoin KRWQ expands to Solana following March EDX Markets listing
entries.snippet: Korean won-denominated stablecoin KRWQ is expanding to Solana to support Korean won liquidity onchain.

entries.title: Upexi falls 8% after widened fiscal Q3 net loss
entries.snippet: Upexi increased its Solana holdings to 2.5 million, valued at more than $238 million, making it the second-largest listed corporate Solana treasury, behind Forward Industries.

entries.title: Coinbase Adds Solana to Crypto-Backed Loans Offering
entries.snippet: Coinbase has added Solana (SOL) to its crypto-backed loans offering. “Holding SOL? SOL-backed loans are now available on Coinbase,” the company said in a Tuesday (May 12) post on X. “Instantly borrow up to $100K in USDC against your Solana without selling.” According to a Coinbase webpage about its
entries.tweet_text: @coinbase Adds Solana to Crypto-Backed Loans Offering

entries.title: First-ever Hyperliquid ETF launches, posts 'very solid' first day of trading: analyst
entries.snippet: Investors buying shares in the instrument gain exposure to the HYPE token without having to own the cryptocurrency.

entries.title: DTCC to use Chainlink to power 24/7 collateral management network
entries.snippet: The world’s largest post-trade infrastructure provider will integrate Chainlink technology into its tokenized collateral platform ahead of a Q4 2026 launch.
entries.tweet_text: DTCC to use Chainlink to power 24/7 collateral management network

entries.title: The Ethereum Foundation unveils new 'Clear Signing' standard to stop users from approving malicious crypto transactions
LMAX Group launches digital asset collateral solution for institutions
entries.snippet: The new portal lets LMAX clients deposit digital assets into custody and use them as collateral to trade FX, metals, CFDs, perpetual futures and crypto.

entries.title: Bernstein reiterates $67 Figure target after Q1 loan volumes double, sees 72% upside from tokenization thesis
entries.snippet: Bernstein reiterates $67 Figure target with 72% upside after Q1 loan volumes jump 113% year-over-year to $2.9 billion.

entries.title: Bernstein maintains $190 Circle price target as $222 million ARC presale cushions rate pressure
entries.snippet: Bernstein maintained its $190 Circle target, citing ARC presale proceeds, USDC growth, and expanding stablecoin payments infrastructure.

entries.snippet: USDC issuer Circle launched a suite of tools designed to let AI agents hold money, pay for services, and transact without human involvement.

entries.title: Galaxy-backed Boundary to launch 'verifiable' institutional stablecoin USBD
entries.snippet: The project has raised $2 million in pre-seed funding led by Galaxy Ventures and plans to launch USBD on Ethereum in early summer 2026.

entries.title: Sharplink Q1 revenue tops $12 million as it pursues 'singles and doubles' hits in ETH yield
entries.snippet: Sharplink said its new Galaxy Digital partnership will deploy roughly $125 million into onchain liquidity and DeFi opportunities.

entries.title: Ripple Lands $200 Million Financing Facility to Expand Institutional Crypto Brokerage
entries.snippet: The XRP-linked Ripple secures financing from Neuberger Specialty Finance to fuel growth of its prime brokerage platform.

entries.title: Circle Chases Agentic Growth to Scale Stablecoin Infrastructure

entries.title: MoonPay Acquires Dawn Labs, Launches AI Trading Copilot for Prediction Markets
entries.snippet: MoonPay’s new Dawn CLI AI trading product lets users turn plain-English prompts into automated crypto trading strategies.

entries.title: Crypto.com receives UAE license tied to Dubai government crypto payments
entries.snippet: Crypto.com's UAE entity became the first VASP to receive a UAE central bank SVF license tied to Dubai government crypto payment services.

entries.title: 7 Democrats seen as 'key' to advancing CLARITY Act
entries.snippet: The CLARITY Act, introduced in July 2025, stalled in January after Coinbase withdrew its support for the legislation over concerns about legal protections and stablecoin yields.

entries.title: SUI spikes 50% amid staking moves, zero-fee stablecoins, privacy push
entries.snippet: Adeniyi Abiodun, co-founder of Mysten Labs, announced at an event in Miami plans for zero-fee stablecoin transfers on Sui and reiterated the ambition to add private transactions.

entries.title: England central banker says global stablecoin rules will 'grapple' with US
entries.snippet: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey says regulators will have to deal with the US when forming global stablecoin standards.

entries.title: FDIC and OCC Both Want to Be Stablecoins' New Boss
entries.snippet: Washington has decided that stablecoins are too significant, economically and systemically, to remain outside the regulatory perimeter. Now comes the rulemaking. entries.title: ECB Governor Sounds Warnings on AI and Stablecoins
entries.snippet: A European Central Bank official wants bankers to test their infrastructure for artificial intelligence-related threats. entries.snippet: The fundraise would be Digital Asset's largest to date and comes as the Canton Network has attracted partners like Visa and Goldman Sachs.

entries.title: Kraken parent company applies for OCC charter in move toward banking
entries.snippet: The US banking regulator has already approved similar charter applications for Coinbase, Ripple Labs, BitGo, Circle, Fidelity Digital Assets and Paxos.

entries.title: Zcash Targeting Post-Quantum Crypto Milestone by 2027
entries.snippet: The privacy-focused cryptocurrency plans to launch a quantum-recoverable wallet within a month as it outlines its roadmap.

entries.title: ECB's Lagarde flags euro-denominated stablecoins as financial stability risk, diverging from Bundesbank stance
entries.snippet: The ECB President argued that euro-denominated stablecoins risk financial stability and monetary policy, pushing for a digital euro instead.

entries.title: AUSTRAC Launches Supervision Campaigns as Australia's Crypto Regulatory Reforms Kick In
entries.snippet: The campaigns target over-the-counter operators and local exchanges as new laws expand oversight to custody and brokerage services.

entries.title: Solv Protocol drops LayerZero in favor of Chainlink for $700 million tokenized bitcoin
entries.snippet: It cited security as the core reason for the migration, in an apparent response to the recent exploit of LayerZero-powered Kelp DAO.

entries.title: Coinbase and AWS launch USDC payment rails for AI agents
entries.snippet: The integration allows AI agents built on Amazon Bedrock AgentCore to make USDC micropayments and access services autonomously using Coinbase’s x402 protocol.
entries.tweet_text: @coinbase and AWS launch USDC payment rails for AI agents

entries.title: AWS unveils AI agent payments based on stablecoins
entries.snippet: Amazon Web Services (AWS) has introduced one of the first end-to-end payment systems for AI agents, built in collaboration with Coinbase and Stripe.
